panels.title: Memory total GB
panels.description: Kubernetes node capacity (all nodes). Usage panels only include nodes where node-exporter is reachable.

panels.title: VRAM total
panels.description: Sum of DCGM framebuffer metrics across GPUs reporting to Prometheus. With a single GPU node, totals reflect that one device.

panels.title: Nodes reporting
panels.description: Node-exporter scrape count vs cluster size. If reporting < total, open 9100/10250 on the missing node (desktop: Hyper-V firewall script as Admin).

panels.title: VRAM used %
panels.description: Sum of DCGM framebuffer metrics across GPUs reporting to Prometheus. With a single GPU node, totals reflect that one device.

targets.expr: 100 * (1 - sum(max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"})) / sum(max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_size_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"})))

panels.title: Disk used %
panels.description: Cluster-wide physical disk use. Each block device counted once per node.

panels.title: Disk used GB
panels.description: Cluster sum of used space on all nodes (engine, desktop, blackpearl, deck, anch0r).

panels.title: Disk total GB
panels.description: Cluster sum of mounted capacity on all 5 nodes — includes blackpearl NVMe (~444G), deck Pi SD (~470G), anch0r Pi SD (~58G), plus engine and desktop.
All 5 nodes: engine HDD+USB+NVMe, desktop WSL, blackpearl NVMe SSD, deck/anch0r Pi SD cards. Sum of mounted ext4 block devices (deduped).

targets.expr: (sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_size_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"})) / 1024^3) * on(instance) group_left(node) label_replace(kube_node_info, "instance", "$1:9100", "internal_ip", "(.*)")

((sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_size_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"})) - sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"}))) / 1024^3) * on(instance) group_left(node) label_replace(kube_node_info, "instance", "$1:9100", "internal_ip", "(.*)")

(100 * (1 - (sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"})) / sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_size_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"}))))) * on(instance) group_left(node) label_replace(kube_node_info, "instance", "$1:9100", "internal_ip", "(.*)")

panels.title: Storage by node

(100 * (1 - (sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"})) / sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_size_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"}))))) * on(instance) group_left(node) label_replace(kube_node_info, "instance", "$1:9100", "internal_ip", "(.*)")

((sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_size_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"})) - sum by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{fstype=~"ext4|xfs|btrfs|ext2|vfat",mountpoint!~"/boot.*|/run/credentials.*|/var/lib/kubelet/.*|/mnt/wsl.*|/mnt/c|/mnt/e|/host|/var/lib/docker.*|/run/k3s.*"}))) / 1024^3) * on(instance) group_left(node) label_replace(kube_node_info, "instance", "$1:9100", "internal_ip", "(.*)")
